---
title: "Welcome"
---

Hi! I'm Fede, and I love data science, old music and good books. 

I have a bachelor degree in economics and a master in statistics. 

I'm also good at programming (mostly in R and Python).

If You want to know me, here are my [contacts](contacts.qmd).

My academic background is resumend [here](statpapers.qmd) while my life background is [here](about.qmd).

If You have free time (I hope that) and need a good book, I suggest [these](mybooks.qmd).

If You wish to play a musical instrument but You are lazy, I suggest the ukulele.
